Package org.eventb.core

Interface IPOHint

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Subinterfaces:
IPOSelectionHint
All Known Implementing Classes:
POSelectionHint
public interface IPOHint extends IInternalElement
A hint for a proof of a proof obligation. A hint is labeled so that hints can be accumulated. This is a marker interface to permit systematic treatment of hints in implementations. All hints should extend this interface.
Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • ILabeledElement.getLabel()
  • ILabeledElement.setLabel(String, IProgressMonitor)
  • IPOSelectionHint
